# [Phase 3] Token-Economy Throttle (Coalescing Window)

**Origin Session ID:** `27016011-8ae9-48bb-af87-9479dd5b0fd0`

## Intent
Implement the Token-Economy Throttle (coalescing window) for the Phase 3 autonomous wake substrate, per **ADR 0002**.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Implement a 30-60s coalescing window to prevent wake thrashing.
- [ ] Implement the digest payload format.
- [ ] Ensure coalescing overrides per `WAKE_SUBSCRIPTION` are respected.
- [ ] Build against the contract defined in `learn/agentos/decisions/0002-phase3-wake-substrate-standards-alignment.md` §6.4.
